name: Tic Tac Toe
description: Classic 3x3 grid game. Get three in a row to win!
rules:
OVERVIEW
Perfect-information 3x3 alignment game. X moves first, O second. A player wins by occupying any full row, column, or diagonal; a full board with no line is a draw.

VIEW
board is 9 cells in row-major order, using null, X, or O. agentView prints coordinates and marks. turn is the player to move; marks maps players to X/O; winner and draw end the game.

ACTIONS
place(cell) marks one empty cell 0-8.
